message:
test(core): expand virtualizer test coverage to 100%

Add 28 comprehensive tests for the virtualizer module covering:

SequenceVirtualizer class:
- Constructor property assignment
- Default overscan value
- getWindow() at start, middle, and end boundaries
- getVisibleRange() with boundary clamping

Utility functions:
- calculateViewportMetrics() for standard and edge cases
- calculateScrollLimits() for DNA, AA, and dual modes
- snapToGeneBoundary() navigation in both directions
- findGeneAtPosition() with inclusive start, exclusive end

Coverage improves from 74.26% to 100% line coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
